title: Goibibo Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Goibibo Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Goibibo Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goibibo Hotels:
Goibibo Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo Hotels!
